title: Goedkeuringssysteem
desc: Controleer bestellingen van de vloot voordat ze worden verwerkt

treatments.brief: A vertical approval status-timeline for one order. Subtitle line: 'Bestelling PO-2026-0482 · MS Aldebaran · €2.480'. Nodes top-to-bottom: 'Aanvraag ingediend' (green check, done) -> 'Ter goedkeuring' (navy LIVE node with a small 'nu' pill, the single signature) -> 'Goedgekeurd' (grey pending) -> 'Verwerkt' (grey pending). Green spine for done, dashed grey after the live node. Keep it COMPACT so the whole document fits.

An approval overview: a donut/ring (navy carries it) showing this month's split — Goedgekeurd (green segment), Te keuren (blue), Afgewezen (red, small) — with a center total '18 bestellingen'; plus two stat tiles: '14 goedgekeurd' and 'gem. doorlooptijd 3 u'. maart 2026.
